UD JURY TRIALS

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem: Paul Renne, Clerk: R. Wong, Not Reported. (D501/JPT)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Kimberly Villegas
Attorney Kaquishka Turner for the plaintiff.
Defendant Derek Buckner is present.
Attorney Erin Katayama appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of February 5, 2018 is vacated. (501)
